---
id: handle-create-checkout
title: "Create checkout session"
description: "Creates a Polar Checkout session for the given product/price ID and returns the hosted checkout URL. Optionally accepts a discount code. The caller must be the billing account owner"
sidebar_label: "Create checkout session"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create checkout session"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/billing/checkout"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a Polar Checkout session for the given product/price ID and returns the hosted checkout URL. Optionally accepts a discount code. The caller must be the billing account owner

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
